2026/05/26 21:15:37.104139277 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104145516 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104178545 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104179617 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104198935 {
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104200057 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104241658 new <- list()
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104243691 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104260266 new$width <- width
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104261087 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104274457 new$height <- height
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104275148 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104288277 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104288978 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104301897 new$title <- title
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104302638 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104315337 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104316068 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104329067 new$version <- version
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104329758 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104344410 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104345121 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104358511 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104359172 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104372181 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104372922 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104385160 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104385851 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104398550 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104399271 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104413201 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104413892 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104427923 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104428634 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104442395 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104443166 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104465799 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104466520 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104480531 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104481202 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104495152 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104495894 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104512738 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104513650 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104529483 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104531276 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104558736 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104559628 "default"))
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104600969 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104601910 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104616151 }
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104617032 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104709168 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104710911 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104732172 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104732994 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104747575 }
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104748346 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104760995 }
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104761796 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104774605 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104775386 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104789116 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104789938 domain = NA)
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104804699 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104805370 }
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104818159 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104818910 old$family <- family
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104833051 }
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104833812 version <- old$version
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104844238 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104847803 "2.0")
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104866210 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104867702 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104884998 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104886340 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104901913 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104902814 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104961251 domain = NA)
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104968271 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104993308 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/26 21:15:37.104994299 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/26 21:15:37.105013077 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/26 21:15:37.105013808 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/26 21:15:37.105029311 invisible()

2026/05/26 21:15:42.184438355 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184455821 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184491404 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184492395 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184582458 {
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184628516 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184629598 new <- list()
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184642783 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184644946 new$width <- width
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184682221 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184718735 new$height <- height
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184719706 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184733667 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184734448 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184792538 new$title <- title
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184796074 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184813249 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184814050 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184846158 new$version <- version
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184846909 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184860098 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184860869 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184874079 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184874800 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184887629 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184888420 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184900558 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184901259 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184913908 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184914699 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184928429 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184929210 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184958509 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184960602 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184979450 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184980361 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184995433 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184996254 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185010986 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185011958 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185026930 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185027711 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185045337 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185046178 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185063313 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185064055 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185080259 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185081090 "default"))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185096913 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185097664 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185111495 }
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185112266 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185126822 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185128534 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185149841 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185150983 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185166296 }
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185167057 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185180016 }
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185180947 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185193956 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185194707 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185235468 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185253735 domain = NA)
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185276258 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185277159 }
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185293573 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185294325 old$family <- family
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185309707 }
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185310889 version <- old$version
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185321985 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185323187 "2.0")
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185339491 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185340322 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185361794 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185362605 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185376256 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185376706 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185392590 domain = NA)
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185393311 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185408763 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185409455 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185428883 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185429724 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185452017 invisible()
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185452819 }

2026/05/26 21:15:42.184438355 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184455821 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184491404 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184492395 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184582458 {
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184628516 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184629598 new <- list()
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184642783 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184644946 new$width <- width

2026/05/26 21:15:42.184813249 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184814050 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184846158 new$version <- version
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184846909 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184860098 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184860869 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184874079 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184874800 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184887629 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184888420 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184900558 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184901259 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184913908 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184914699 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184928429 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184929210 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184958509 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184960602 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184979450 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184980361 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184995433 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/26 21:15:42.184996254 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185010986 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185011958 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185026930 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185027711 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185045337 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185046178 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185063313 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185064055 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185080259 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185081090 "default"))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185096913 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185097664 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185111495 }
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185112266 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185126822 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185128534 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185149841 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185150983 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185166296 }
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185167057 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185180016 }
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185180947 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185193956 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185194707 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185235468 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185253735 domain = NA)
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185276258 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185277159 }
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185293573 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185294325 old$family <- family
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185309707 }
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185310889 version <- old$version
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185321985 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185323187 "2.0")

2026/05/26 21:15:42.185361794 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185362605 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185376256 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185376706 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185392590 domain = NA)
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185393311 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185408763 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185409455 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185428883 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185429724 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/26 21:15:42.185452017 invisible()
